heroText: This page is for current attendees and recent graduates. Check here for your latest notes, handouts, updates, encouragement, and archived materials from previous weeks.

posts.title: Stay in the fight this week.
posts.text: Use this section for a short written post each week. This can be encouragement, a challenge, a reminder, or a practical word to keep the men leaning in between sessions.

posts.title: Do not coast after a strong week.
posts.text: What starts strong often fades when a man goes passive again. Stay alert. Revisit the material. Be honest this week. Stay engaged with what God is exposing and rebuilding.
